name: multi_turn_templating
description: Demonstrates `{{prev.*}}` and `{{turn_N.*}}` placeholders. Turn 0 establishes a value; Turn 1 echoes it via `{{prev.reply_text}}`; Turn 2 reaches back to Turn 0 via `{{turn_0.reply_text}}`. Placeholders are rendered before the agent sees the message; if a template references a turn that has not run yet, the run fails fast.

turns.message: I'm picking a lucky number for a demo. The number is 47. Acknowledge with a single short sentence that mentions 47.
Repeat back exactly what you just said, prefixed with 'Echoing: '. For reference, your previous reply was: {{prev.reply_text}}
Looking back at turn 0, your reply there was: {{turn_0.reply_text}}. Reply with only the number from that message on its own line.
